title: EOLakeWatch: Image archive - Canada.ca
content:
## EOLakeWatch: Image archive
Welcome to the image archive!
This page hosts a collection of high-quality optical satellite images across Canadian lakes from many different earth observation satellites and repositories.
These images highlight examples of water-related topics including: lake ice, algal blooms, suspended sediments, and more.
Click on the image thumbnails in the table below to enlarge the images, and view their captions.
- Remote sensing of algal blooms
- Interactive algal bloom monitoring tool
- Annual algal bloom summary reports
- Frequently asked questions
- Subscribe for updates
Sentinel-2 Multispectral Instrument
Landsat-8 Operational Land Imager
Sentinel-2 Multispectral Instrument
